name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN in Las Vegas offers pawn loans, gold buying, firearms transactions, and pre-owned merchandise at 25–70% off retail, with an online rewards program.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, NV. The store operates six days a week with extended weekday hours and offers a broad suite of collateral-based financial services alongside a retail resale operation. As a physical storefront serving the Las Vegas community, it positions itself as a neighborhood resource for fast cash and affordable pre-owned goods.

The store's core offering is pawn loans — customers bring in items of value and receive a cash loan based on the assessed worth of those items. Beyond standard pawning, this Las Vegas location also buys gold and diamond jewelry, loans on and purchases firearms, and offers auto loans as a listed specialty category. On the retail side, EZPAWN sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise across electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, musical equipment, handbags, and sneakers at prices 25–70% below new retail. An online shop with daily inventory updates extends reach beyond foot traffic.

EZPAWN differentiates through its EZ+ Rewards Program, which lets customers manage pawn extensions and layaway payments online and earn points on eligible transactions. The Instant Quote tool allows customers to get an estimated value on electronics before visiting the store. Layaway is available year-round with only 10% down. For retail purchases, a "Take Today" option through third-party partners offers financing up to 12 months based on credit eligibility. Product protection plans and a Jewelry VIP Program (with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning) add post-purchase value.

EZPAWN is a practical short-term cash option for people with pawnable assets who need funds quickly, but it is not a low-cost borrowing solution. Pawn loan fees and APRs are not disclosed on the website — customers must visit in person. The Take Today financing option depends on third-party credit approval, which may exclude the very customers most likely to need it. Interest rates and loan terms are entirely opaque online, which is a meaningful drawback for comparison shopping.
address: 4155 S Jones Blvd Ste B, Las Vegas, NV 89103

company_info.headquarters: 4155 S Jones Blvd Ste B, Las Vegas, NV 89103

pros: EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and payments online without visiting the store
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics values online before customers make the trip
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
Firearms loans and purchases offered on-site with secure on-premises storage
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory arrivals
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with in-house expert appraisers
Auto loans listed as a specialty service at this location
cons: Pawn loan APRs, interest rates, and fee structures are not disclosed on the website
Take Today financing requires third-party credit approval — may be unavailable to unbanked or low-credit customers
Online payment functionality is not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (national limitation noted in-store)
Firearms redemption requires a background check, adding a step that may delay retrieval
No indication of loan amounts or loan-to-value ratios, making it impossible to compare costs before visiting
best_for: People who own electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms and need cash within hours
Bargain hunters seeking brand-name pre-owned goods at deep discounts
Customers who want to sell gold or diamond jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers who need layaway to spread out purchases without a credit check
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who have tangible assets to collateralize and need cash the same day, or who want heavily discounted pre-owned goods without a credit check. The main caveat is full cost opacity — loan fees and APRs are never disclosed online, so borrowers cannot meaningfully compare this against other emergency cash options before walking in.
services: Online shop with daily inventory updates
EZ+ Rewards Program (online pawn and layaway management)
Take Today third-party financing (up to 12 months)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
